name: SAM Check Cashing Machine
description_short: SAM Check Cashing Machine offers check cashing and financial services at a Detroit location with extended hours until 9 PM on weekdays.
description_long: SAM Check Cashing Machine operates a physical check-cashing storefront located at 20250 Seven Mile W in Detroit, Michigan. The business serves the local community with financial services centered on check cashing and related transactions. Based on the available information from their Waze listing, the company maintains a standard retail location open to walk-in customers throughout the week. The business appears to be part of a larger network with multiple locations, as indicated by their website reference to a locations page. SAM Check Cashing Machine distinguishes itself through extended operating hours, remaining open until 9 PM on weekdays (Monday through Saturday) and until 7 PM on Sundays, making their services accessible for customers with non-standard schedules. This extended availability is notably longer than many competing check-cashing services. The company can be reached directly at their Detroit location via phone at (313) 538-0000 for customer inquiries. Based on publicly available information, SAM Check Cashing Machine serves primarily unbanked and underbanked consumers in the Detroit area who need immediate access to funds from checks without traditional bank accounts. The company's focus on check cashing positions it as a transactional service provider rather than a credit or lending institution, making it suitable for customers seeking quick cash conversion rather than financial products.
pros: Extended weekday hours until 9 PM, providing access for working customers
Open on Sundays until 7 PM, offering weekend service convenience
Physical storefront location in Detroit with direct phone support
Part of a multi-location network suggesting operational stability
Accessible walk-in service without appointment requirements
cons: Limited information available about specific fees and rates on their Waze listing
No details provided about alternative services beyond check cashing
Website content does not specify accepted check types or minimum/maximum amounts
No information about identity verification requirements or processing times
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals needing immediate check conversion
Workers with non-standard schedules requiring evening or weekend access
People in the Detroit area seeking local check-cashing alternatives to banks
diagnosis: SAM Check Cashing Machine is best for unbanked Detroit residents needing quick check conversion outside traditional banking hours, particularly those who work evenings or weekends. The main caveat is that the Waze listing provides minimal detail about fees, specific services offered beyond check cashing, or terms—customers should call (313) 538-0000 to confirm rates and service details before visiting.
